data.title: Microsoft Reportedly Eyed Cursor Before SpaceX's $60 Billion Deal— But Chose Not To Proceed
data.description: US tech company Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) had shown interest in acquiring AI coding startup Cursor before SpaceX offered a $60 billion deal. Microsoft's CEO Satya Nadella aimed to enhance its AI tools in the expanding AI market, but decided not to proceed with a bid, as per CNBC. Neither Microsoft nor Cursor responded to Benzinga's request for comments. This development surfaces amid Microsoft's strategies in the tech industry, with significant implications for the AI sector. The potential acquisition and subsequent decision convey the competitive landscape in the tech and AI sectors.

data.title: Global Electric Cargo Bike Market | USA, China, India Lead | Rad Power Bikes, Riese & Müller, Tern Bicycles Drive Sustainable Urban Mobility Transition
data.description: In April 23, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a recent report from Future Market Insights reveals that the global electric cargo bike sector is experiencing significant growth. This surge is being fueled by the growing demand in e-commerce, urban traffic congestion issues, and the increasing focus on zero-emission transportation solutions. The analysis indicates a promising future for the industry with substantial opportunities for expansion.

data.title: Novo Nordisk’s oral semaglutide demonstrates potential to be the first oral GLP-1 RA therapy for children and adolescents with type 2 diabetes
data.description: The PIONEER TEENS trial marks a significant milestone as the first clinical study to evaluate the effects of an oral GLP-1 medication in children and teenagers aged 10 to 17 who have Type 2 diabetes. This trial aims to address a crucial gap in the treatment options available for this age group, where there is a lack of adequate therapies. By focusing on this demographic, the study seeks to understand how this novel oral medication can benefit adolescents with Type 2 diabetes, potentially providing a new avenue for managing the condition in this population group.
